requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety Under NIS IEC 62841 and SONCAP
requirement_topic.zh: NIS IEC 62841 与 SONCAP 下的电气安全
requirement_topic.zht: NIS IEC 62841 與 SONCAP 下的電氣安全

summary.en: Standards Organisation of Nigeria adopts IEC safety standards as NIS, and motor-operated electric tools are assessed against NIS IEC 62841 (hand-held, transportable, and lawn and garden machinery). Safety conformity must be demonstrated through SONCAP testing and certification before a Product Certificate and per-shipment SONCAP Certificate can be issued. The Nigerian grid is 230 V at 50 Hz, so tool insulation, marking, and rated voltage must suit 230 V even though the 50 Hz frequency matches China.
summary.zh: 尼日利亚标准组织将 IEC 安全标准采纳为 NIS，电机驱动电动工具按 NIS IEC 62841 评定（手持、可移式及园林工具）。安全符合性须通过 SONCAP 测试和认证证明，方可签发产品证书及每批货物的 SONCAP 证书。尼日利亚电网为 230 V、50 Hz，因此工具绝缘、标识和额定电压须适配 230 V，尽管 50 Hz 频率与中国一致。
summary.zht: 奈及利亞標準組織將 IEC 安全標準採納為 NIS，電機驅動電動工具按 NIS IEC 62841 評定（手持、可移式及園林工具）。安全符合性須透過 SONCAP 測試和認證證明，方可簽發產品證書及每批貨物的 SONCAP 證書。奈及利亞電網為 230 V、50 Hz，因此工具絕緣、標識和額定電壓須適配 230 V，儘管 50 Hz 頻率與中國一致。

standards_or_laws: NIS IEC 62841 series (adopted by Standards Organisation of Nigeria)
SONCAP (SON Conformity Assessment Programme) Product Certificate and per-shipment SONCAP Certificate
SON Act 2015 (Standards Organisation of Nigeria Act)

summary.en: China power-tool safety files commonly use the GB/T 3883 series (aligned to IEC 62841) for hand-held motor-operated tools, with CCC applied where the product falls in the compulsory certification catalogue. GB/T 3883 evidence does not by itself satisfy SONCAP and must be re-mapped to NIS IEC 62841 with 230 V ratings.
summary.zh: 中国电动工具安全文件通常采用 GB/T 3883 系列（与 IEC 62841 对齐）证明手持式电动工具，并在产品列入强制认证目录时适用 CCC。GB/T 3883 证据本身不能满足 SONCAP，须重新映射到 NIS IEC 62841 并采用 230 V 额定值。
summary.zht: 中國電動工具安全文件通常採用 GB/T 3883 系列（與 IEC 62841 對齊）證明手持式電動工具，並在產品列入強制認證目錄時適用 CCC。GB/T 3883 證據本身不能滿足 SONCAP，須重新映射到 NIS IEC 62841 並採用 230 V 額定值。

standards_or_laws: CCC where the product is in the compulsory certification catalogue

gap.en: A China GB/T 3883 report is not a SONCAP certificate. The exporter must route the tool and its charger through a SON-recognised conformity assessment to obtain the Product Certificate and per-shipment SONCAP Certificate, with rated voltage, marking, and instructions adjusted for the Nigerian 230 V 50 Hz supply.
gap.zh: 中国 GB/T 3883 报告不等于 SONCAP 证书。出口商须将工具及其充电器经 SON 认可的合格评定，取得产品证书和每批货物的 SONCAP 证书，并按尼日利亚 230 V、50 Hz 供电调整额定电压、标识和说明书。
gap.zht: 中國 GB/T 3883 報告不等於 SONCAP 證書。出口商須將工具及其充電器經 SON 認可的合格評定，取得產品證書和每批貨物的 SONCAP 證書，並按奈及利亞 230 V、50 Hz 供電調整額定電壓、標識和說明書。

target.en: Mandatory: SONCAP certification with safety assessed against NIS IEC 62841 is required before customs clearance in Nigeria.
target.zh: 强制：清关前须完成 SONCAP 认证，安全按 NIS IEC 62841 评定。
target.zht: 強制：清關前須完成 SONCAP 認證，安全按 NIS IEC 62841 評定。

cn.en: China domestic baseline commonly uses GB/T 3883 series, with CCC where catalogue-listed.
cn.zh: 中国境内基线通常采用 GB/T 3883 系列，列入目录时适用 CCC。
cn.zht: 中國境內基線通常採用 GB/T 3883 系列，列入目錄時適用 CCC。

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Not Nigeria-ready until tool and charger safety is assessed against NIS IEC 62841 through SONCAP and the Product Certificate plus per-shipment SONCAP Certificate are obtained, with ratings suited to 230 V 50 Hz.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在工具和充电器安全按 NIS IEC 62841 经 SONCAP 评定，并取得产品证书及每批货物 SONCAP 证书、额定值适配 230 V 50 Hz 之前，不能视为尼日利亚就绪。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在工具和充電器安全按 NIS IEC 62841 經 SONCAP 評定，並取得產品證書及每批貨物 SONCAP 證書、額定值適配 230 V 50 Hz 之前，不能視為奈及利亞就緒。
